title: Rift Case
description: Canonical record for a single Rift case (one finding, one trust-boundary failure, one report unit).

case_id.description: S-prefixed sequential ID with kebab-case slug, e.g. S001-workspace-content-instruction.

vendor.description: OpenAI | Microsoft | Google | xAI | Meta | local | other. Free-form; keep lowercase-canonical for retrieval.

product_surface.description: Concrete product the case targets, e.g. 'a coding-agent CLI', 'Cursor', 'M365 Copilot Chat', 'Codex CLI'.

mode.description: Permission/operating mode used to reproduce, e.g. 'full-access', 'workspace-write', 'read-only', 'normal-default'.

untrusted_input_source.description: Where the untrusted content entered the trust boundary (e.g. 'repo README.md', 'tool stdout', 'retrieved doc', 'memory note').

trusted_context_or_capability.description: What was trusted / granted at session start (mode flags, scopes, tools, capabilities).

user_intent.description: Stated user intent at session start, in researcher's words.

model_or_agent_action.description: Ordered list of observed actions the model/agent took.

trust_boundary_crossed.description: Which boundary collapsed (e.g. 'workspace content -> instruction', 'tool output -> agent goal', 'retrieved doc -> user intent').

not_claimed.description: Explicit non-claims to neutralize over-claim triage pushback.

severity_defense.description: Bullet rebuttals to anticipated downgrade arguments.
